## Release v2.1.8 — Silent printing SEO & documentation

### Highlights

- Repositioned npm/GitHub SEO from **html-to-pdf** to **silent printing / local print agent**
- README / README_CN overhaul: tool comparison, FAQ, bilingual official doc links, 38+ deep links to webprintpdf.com
- Cross-platform client support documented (Windows / Linux / macOS)
- GitHub About Topics aligned with new keyword strategy

### Changed

- npm `description`, `githubDescription`, and 27 keywords updated
- npm `homepage` → `https://webprintpdf.com/en/docs/`
- Official resource links: demos, advanced config, comparisons, frameworks, scenarios, deployment guides
- FAQ deep-links to official articles; UTM on marketing links
- GitHub SEO docs and `repo-seo.config.json` synced

### Install / upgrade

```bash
npm install web-print-pdf@2.1.8
```

**Client required:** [Web Print Expert Client](https://webprintpdf.com/en/downloadApp/)

**Docs:** [English](https://webprintpdf.com/en/docs/) · [中文](https://webprintpdf.com/docs/)

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/weixiaoyi/web-print-pdf/compare/v2.1.7...v2.1.8
